role.mainResponsibility: Restore/autofill profile management workspace. Lists saved restore profiles, shows profile details, and deletes restore profiles.

pros: Folder owner becomes restore while component symbol/file name stays stable.
Route import path-only change is small.
Avoids mixing folder move with component rename.
cons: AutoRestoreWorkspace name remains more specific than folder domain.
targetCandidates.routeImpact: No URL change; import path only.

pros: File name aligns with broader restore domain and AppShell title Restore.
cons: Requires file move + filename rename + default function/local symbol/import symbol rename decision.
Larger micro-step than needed for folder ownership cleanup.
targetCandidates.routeImpact: No URL change if route file import is updated.

cons: components/autorestore folder remains outside target feature structure.

recommendation.summary: Move AutoRestoreWorkspace.tsx to src/components/restore/AutoRestoreWorkspace.tsx and update src/app/autorestore/page.tsx import path only.
recommendation.reason: Workspace is restore profile management UI. Keeping filename avoids bundling rename/symbol churn into folder ownership cleanup.
recommendation.deferRename: Consider RestoreWorkspace.tsx as a later micro-step if broader restore page semantics are desired.

dependencyImpact.requireLoginRelation: Route page wraps workspace with RequireLogin; workspace itself does not import RequireLogin.
dependencyImpact.relativeImportChangeNeeded: ../layout/AppProviders becomes ../layout/AppProviders if moved to components/restore (same depth); no change needed for this relative import.
dependencyImpact.notes: Workspace imports restoreProfileStore only among restore domain stores; it does not directly import common/storage historyStore/imageStore.

routeImpact.notes: Route URL /autorestore and AppShell title Restore can remain unchanged; only component import path changes in move step.

validationPlan: 실제 move 단계에서는 route URL을 변경하지 않는다.
AutoRestoreWorkspace 파일명과 default component symbol은 유지한다.
restoreProfileStore 이동은 별도 RS-2 precheck로 분리한다.
nextSteps: Run RS-1 move: create src/components/restore and move AutoRestoreWorkspace.tsx keeping filename.
Update src/app/autorestore/page.tsx import path only; keep /autorestore route URL.
Consider RestoreWorkspace rename only as a later separate micro-step.
